# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 30 — Refundable Adoption Credit (Form 8839 line 13) — NEW for 2025

> Tax year 2025. Last re-authored 2026-06-15.

---

## 1. Outputs (THREE co-outputs — most of any audited line)

| Output field | Java model | Form 1040 destination |
|---|---|---|
| `Payments.refundableAdoptionCredit` | `Form8839.part2Line13RefundableAdoptionCredit` | **Line 30** (refundable adoption credit — NEW for 2025) |
| `Schedule3NonrefundableCredits.adoptionCredit` | `Form8839.part2Line18NonrefundableAdoptionCredit` | Schedule 3 line 6c → Form 1040 line 20 |
| `Income.adoptionBenefits` | `Form8839.part3Line31TaxableBenefits` | Line 1f (taxable employer-provided adoption benefits) |

★ **SPLIT-STAGE TWO-METHOD pattern** — these three outputs are produced by two methods sharing state via `AdoptionComputation`:
- `computeAdoptionBenefits()` runs **early** in `prepare()` (BEFORE AGI is known) — produces `refundableAdoptionCredit` (line 13) and `line1f` (line 31).
- `applyAdoptionCredit()` runs **later** in `prepare()` (AFTER Schedule 3 lines 1–6b and `totalTaxBeforeCredits` are set) — produces `part2Line17CreditLimit` and `part2Line18NonrefundableAdoptionCredit` (line 18). May also recompute line 13 when MAGI is auto-derived.

### Full Form8839 output fields (Form8839.java)

| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| `header` | `ScheduleHeader` (taxpayer name + SSN) |
| `children` | `List<Form8839Child>` — Part II per-child computed values |
| `part2Line3NoPriorYearForm` / `part2Line3YesPriorYearForm` | Prior-year credit checkbox |
| `part2Line7ModifiedAgi` | MAGI for Part II phaseout |
| `part2Line8MagiNotMoreThanThreshold` / `part2Line8MagiMoreThanThreshold` | Phaseout threshold checkbox |
| `part2Line8MagiExcess` | MAGI − $259,190 |
| `part2Line9PhaseoutFraction` | Phaseout fraction (0.0000–1.0000) |
| `part2Line11cTotalRefundableBase` | Sum of per-child line 11b |
| `part2Line12TotalAfterPhaseout` | Sum of per-child line 11a |
| `part2Line13RefundableAdoptionCredit` | **Line 13 → Form 1040 line 30** |
| `part2Line15CreditCarryforward` | Prior-year carryforward (stays nonrefundable) |
| `part2Line16TotalAvailableCredit` | line 14 + line 15 |
| `part2Line17CreditLimit` | CLW-B result (set by `applyAdoptionCredit`) |
| `part2Line18NonrefundableAdoptionCredit` | **Line 18 → Schedule 3 line 6c** |
| `part3Line23TotalBenefits` | Total W-2 box 12 code T benefits |
| `part3Line25ModifiedAgi` | MAGI for Part III phaseout |
| `part3Line26MagiNotMoreThanThreshold` / `part3Line26MagiMoreThanThreshold` | Part III threshold checkbox |
| `part3Line26MagiExcess` | Part III MAGI excess |
| `part3Line27PhaseoutFraction` | Part III phaseout fraction |
| `part3Line30TotalExcludedBenefits` | Sum of per-child line 24 |
| `part3Line31Line30NotMoreThanLine23` / `part3Line31Line30MoreThanLine23` | Excess benefits checkbox |
| `part3Line31TaxableBenefits` | **Taxable benefits → Form 1040 line 1f** |

### Form8839Child fields

| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| `childName` | First + last name |
| `childYearOfBirth` | For Part III phaseout when domestic special-needs (G-NEW-5) |
| `hasSpecialNeeds` | Drives $17,280 cap and Part III exclusion-cap rules |
| `isForeignChild` | Foreign-finality timing (deferred-benefits exclusion via Gap #6 closure) |
| `adoptionFinal2025OrEarlier` | Final-in-2025 flag for special-needs full-cap and Part III rules |
| Per-child Part II computed fields: `line5`/`line6`/`line11a`/`line11b` | |

---

## 2. Computed inputs

| Field | Source | Used for |
|---|---|---|
| `form1040.adjustments.line11bAmountFromLine11aAdjustedGrossIncome` (AGI) | `buildAdjustments()` | MAGI auto-derive (G1) inside `applyAdoptionCredit` |
| `form1040.taxAndCredits.totalTaxBeforeCredits` | `computeLine18()` | CLW-B line 2 |
| `Schedule3NonrefundableCredits.foreignTaxCredit + childDependentCareCredit + educationCredits + retirementSavings + residentialCleanEnergy + energyEfficientHome + elderlyDisabledCredit + amountFromForm8978Line14` | Prior `applyXxxToSchedule3` methods | CLW-B prior-credits subtraction (G2/G3 — includes lines 1+2+3+4+5b+6d+6f+6m) |
| `Schedule8812.creditLimitWorksheetBLine14` | `computeSchedule8812()` | CLW-B substitute when non-null (G7) |
| Form 2555 computed (taxpayer + spouse on MFJ) | `computeForeignEarnedIncome()` | MAGI auto-derive add-back |

| Form | Field | Used for |
|---|---|---|
| `form-w-2.xlsx` | `box12CodeTAdoptionBenefits` (W-2 box 12 code T) | Part III line 23 total benefits |
| `form-w-2.xlsx` | `employeeSSN` | SSN-filtered aggregation via `isMfsReturn` (Convention 5 — taxpayer-only on MFS; both spouses on MFJ; fallback unfiltered when SSNs absent) |

### 4a. `form-adoption-expenses.xlsx` (children section)

| Field | Purpose |

| `children.entries[].childFirstName / childLastName` | Identification |
| `children.entries[].hasSpecialNeeds` | $17,280 full-cap on Part II; Part III line 24 exclusion full-cap |
| `children.entries[].isForeignChild` | Foreign-finality timing; deferred-benefits exclusion (Gap #6) |
| `children.entries[].adoptionFinal2025OrEarlier` | Final-in-2025 flag |
| `children.moreThanThreeChildren` | Triggers `ADOPTION_BENEFITS_MORE_THAN_SIX_CHILDREN_ATTACHMENT_REQUIRED` advisory (G-NEW-1) |

| `adoptionCreditPartII.line15CreditCarryforward` | Line 15 (stays nonrefundable) |

| `employerBenefitsPartIII.priorYearEmployerBenefitsByChild.child{n}PriorYearBenefits` | Prior-year benefits |
| `employerBenefitsPartIII.deferredPriorYearForeignBenefitsByChild.child{n}DeferredPriorYearForeignBenefits` | Foreign-finality retroactive exclusion (Gap #6 closure 2026-05-24) |

| Field | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `imports.magiForAdoptionBenefitsExclusion` | Manual MAGI override (G1 closure auto-derives when blank) |

### 4e. `form-filing-status.xlsx`

| Field | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `filingStatus` | MFS gate (Part II refundable hard-blocked via G4); MFJ flag for W-2 box 12 code T aggregation |

### 4f. Identification forms

| Field | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `identification-taxpayer.ssn` | W-2 box 12 code T SSN-filter |
| `identification-spouse.ssn` | W-2 box 12 code T SSN-filter (MFJ); null-shadowed on MFS via `isMfsReturn` |

---

## 5. Validation flags

| Flag | Severity | Trigger |
|---|---|---|
| `ADOPTION_BENEFITS_FORM_REQUIRED` | BLOCKING | W-2 box 12 code T present but adoption-expenses form not completed |
| `ADOPTION_BENEFITS_MORE_THAN_SIX_CHILDREN_ATTACHMENT_REQUIRED` | NON-BLOCKING ADVISORY | `children.moreThanThreeChildren=true` — extra Forms 8839 must be manually attached (G-NEW-1) |
| `ADOPTION_BENEFITS_OFF_W2_NOT_SPECIAL_NEEDS_CHILD_N` | BLOCKING (per-child) | Off-W-2 employer benefit on non-special-needs child |
| `ADOPTION_BENEFITS_MFS_EXCLUSION_DISALLOWED` | BLOCKING (G4 — was non-blocking) | MFS taxpayer attempts Part II refundable OR Part III exclusion |
| `ADOPTION_MAGI_MANUAL_VS_AUTO_MISMATCH` | NON-BLOCKING ADVISORY | Manual MAGI differs from auto-derived by > $100 (G-NEW-2 closure 2026-06-11) |

---

## 6. Compute order

1. `computeAdoptionBenefits()` called at `prepare():424` — runs **before** AGI is computed. Uses manual `magiForAdoptionBenefitsExclusion` if present. Produces refundable line 13 + taxable line 31.
2. `computeAgi()` — establishes line 11b.
3. `applyAdoptionCredit()` called at `prepare():~1929` — runs **after** Schedule 3 lines 1–6b and `totalTaxBeforeCredits`. Auto-derives MAGI when manual blank (G1). Computes CLW-B → nonrefundable line 18. May recompute refundable line 13 if MAGI changed.
4. `computeLine31ThroughLine38` final wiring at lines 27239-27250 — prefers `form8839.part2Line13` (potentially updated by G1 recompute) over the early-stage `AdoptionComputation.adoptionCredit()`.

★ **G4 closure (2026-04-20)** — Part II refundable credit AND Part III exclusion are HARD-BLOCKED on MFS (no exception path). Was non-blocking advisory before fix.

---

## 7. 2025 constants

| Constant | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Per-child maximum exclusion / credit | $17,280 | Rev. Proc. 2024-40 |
| MAGI phaseout start (Part II and Part III) | $259,190 | Rev. Proc. 2024-40 |
| MAGI phaseout range | $40,000 (band $259,190–$299,190) | Rev. Proc. 2024-40 |
| Refundable cap per child (**NEW 2025**) | $5,000 | OBBBA 2025 |
| Special-needs domestic adoption full-cap exception (G-NEW-5) | Treats $17,280 as fully claimed even without expenses | IRS Form 8839 instructions |

---

## 8. Key backend locations

| Item | Location |
|---|---|
| `computeAdoptionBenefits` helper | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:18464` |
| W-2 box 12 code T SSN-filtered aggregation | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:18482-18488` |
| `>6 children` advisory | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:18507` |
| Foreign-finality retroactive exclusion | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:18543` (Gap #6) |
| `applyAdoptionCredit` helper | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:22263` |
| MAGI auto-derive (G1) | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:22289-22320` |
| Manual-vs-auto MAGI cross-check | `applyAdoptionCredit` MAGI block (G-NEW-2) |
| Final wiring | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:27239-27250` |

---

## 9. Key invariants

1. **Three co-outputs** — line 30 (refundable) + Schedule 3 line 6c → line 20 (nonrefundable) + line 1f (taxable benefits). All produced by the two-method split-stage helper. Most co-outputs of any audited line.
2. **Refundable cap = $5,000/child** — NEW for 2025 per OBBBA Act. Pre-2025 returns had line 30 reserved.
3. **MAGI auto-derive replaces manual** when manual blank — and may recompute refundable line 13.
4. **MFS hard-block** — Part II refundable + Part III exclusion both blocked. G4 closure.
5. **SSN-filtered W-2 aggregation** — taxpayer-only on MFS; both spouses on MFJ; fallback unfiltered when SSNs absent. Mirrors line 1f Convention 5.
6. **CLW-B includes 8 Schedule 3 credits** — lines 1+2+3+4+5b+6d+6f+6m (G2/G3 closure).
7. **Split-stage state shared** via `AdoptionComputation`. Final wiring prefers the most-recently-updated form8839 value.
8. **Special-needs domestic adoption** — $17,280 cap honored even without actual expenses (G-NEW-5).
9. **Foreign-finality timing** — deferred prior-year benefits exclusion via Gap #6 closure.
